name: SEMrush
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What SEMrush Does

SEMrush is one of the best tools for SEO, PPC, and competitive research, but it’s not built specifically as a Google Maps rank checker. Its local SEO tools are available only in the higher-tier plans. If you're looking for a full maps rank checker, you’ll need the Business or Enterprise plan. Best for agencies, marketers, and enterprises needing deep data insights.

Source: SEMrush 

Key Features

  • SEMrush tracks keyword performance across locations, but only the Business and Enterprise plans support map-based rankings.
  • You can monitor competitors, audit websites, and dig into local SEO with precision

Benefits of SEMrush

  • Provides in-depth SEO and PPC insights
  • Helps track Google Maps rank for multiple locations
  • Monitors competitors to find ranking opportunities

Pricing

  • Pro Plan: $139.95/month (no Google Maps tracking)
  • Guru Plan: $249.95/month (no Google Maps tracking)
  • Business Plan: $499.95/month (includes Google Maps rank checker)
  • Enterprise Plan: Custom pricing (includes maps rank checker)

Pros

  • Comprehensive SEO and PPC tools
  • Great for agencies and large businesses
  • Advanced competitor analysis

Cons

  • Google Maps tracking only in high-tier plans
  • Expensive for small businesses

‍
